output: Batch 4 executed. task_updates.executor_notes: Integrated useTimelineHistory into the data layer. Verified useTimelineData instantiates the history hook and wires save.onBeforeCommitRef.current = history.onBeforeCommit via a layout effect, UseTimelineDataResult now includes undo, redo, canUndo, canRedo, checkpoints, jumpToCheckpoint, and createManualCheckpoint, and those fields are threaded through TimelineChromeContextValue and the chrome memo in useTimelineState.

Added src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineHistory.test.ts with eight cases covering: basic undo/redo, redo invalidation, transactionId collapsing, 300ms debounce collapsing, 100-entry undo cap, checkpoint triggers for session boundary/edit distance/semantic, jumpToCheckpoint stack clearing, and skipHistory-style bypass behavior. Verified the same-transaction test uses five edits with one transactionId and one undo step back to the pre-transaction state, and the checkpoint trigger assertions verify saveCheckpoint receives the expected triggerType values.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed save.onBeforeCommitRef.current = history.onBeforeCommit is wired in useTimelineData, and all seven history fields are threaded from useTimelineData through useTimelineState.types into the chrome context memo.

Confirmed the test file covers all eight requested cases, the five-edit same-transaction case collapses to one undo entry, and the checkpoint trigger assertions verify saveCheckpoint receives the expected triggerType values.
